name: tbl_tmx_attempt_sumtotal
description: This table captures detailed information about user attempts in the Sumtotal Learn system, including metrics on performance, status, and user engagement.

columns.name: attempt_pk
columns.description: Unique identifier for each attempt record in the tbl_tmx_attempt_sumtotal table.

columns.name: empfk
columns.description: Foreign key reference to the employee table, linking attempts to specific employees.

columns.name: activityfk
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the activity associated with the attempt.

columns.name: authregfk
columns.description: Foreign key reference to the authentication registration record.

columns.name: startdt
columns.description: The date when the attempt started, represented as a timestamp without time zone.

columns.name: enddt
columns.description: The date when the attempt ends, represented as a timestamp without time zone.

columns.name: waiveind
columns.description: Indicates whether a certain condition for waiving is met in the context of the attempt.

columns.name: completionstatus
columns.description: Indicates the completion status of an attempt in the learning management system.

columns.name: success
columns.description: Indicates whether the attempt was successful or not.

columns.name: score
columns.description: Column representing the score achieved in an attempt.

columns.name: attndstatusfk
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the attendance status in the related attendance status table.

columns.name: elapsedseconds
columns.description: Represents the total elapsed time in seconds for a specific activity or session.

columns.name: launchcourseversion
columns.description: Version of the course being launched in the system.

columns.name: currentattemptind
columns.description: Indicates the current attempt of a user in a specific activity.

columns.name: launchcount
columns.description: The number of times a course or activity has been launched by a user.

metadata.data_lineage: Data is sourced from user learning activities and is populated through automated processes that track user interactions with the Sumtotal Learn platform.
metadata.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 3 years to comply with business and regulatory requirements.
access_patterns: Frequent read access for learning analytics and reporting by administrators
Occasional write access for updates by the learning management system
metadata.business_purpose: The tbl_tmx_attempt_sumtotal table exists to track user learning attempts, enabling performance analysis, progress monitoring, and compliance reporting within the Sumtotal Learn system.
key_relationships: Employee to attempt relationships for user performance tracking
Activity to attempt relationships for learning progress analysis
